description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, elongated green leaves with prominent lighter and darker variegation, suggesting a tropical or ornamental species. The leaves emerge from a central stem cluster and arch outward, some with visible curling or natural wear. The plant is housed in a simple, unadorned terracotta pot with a slightly flared rim and a matte, earthy finish. The pot appears to be filled with dark soil, visible at the base of the plant. There are no visible decorative elements or plant labels attached to the pot or foliage. The overall appearance is naturalistic, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A broad-leaved, variegated green plant in a plain terracotta pot with visible soil, naturalistic and unadorned.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the dense cluster of variegated leaves radiating from the pot, with soil partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical terracotta pot and the outward arch of the plant's leaves.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the open mouth of the pot, with the plant's base and some leaves visible around the rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pot's profile and the spread of the leaves, with some leaf edges more visible.
attribute_plant_species: banana plant (Musa spp.) or similar broad-leaf tropical
